name: AuthiChain - Lead Capture to CRM Sync
description: Receives lead capture events from AuthiChain/QRON websites and syncs to HubSpot CRM via the /api/leads/webhook endpoint
trigger: Webhook (POST from website lead capture forms)
actions: Receive lead data (email, name, company, source, product_interest)
Forward to AuthiChain /api/leads/webhook which syncs to HubSpot + calculates lead score
Creates/updates HubSpot contact with lead_score, lifecycle stage, lead_status
